rationale: Gov't Code §2306.1073 governs administration of a housing loan program. It does not reference Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts, so increasing the exemption does not conflict with this rule.
quote: Sec. 2306.1073. ADMINISTRATION OF PROGRAM; RULES. (a) The department shall administer the program.
_note: No relationship between this rule and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
